channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Emotions pour from tight-knit skating community following DC plane crash carrying athletes, coaches
item.description: The tight-knit figure skating community was rocked Wednesday when an American Airlines flight carrying athletes, parents and coaches from a development camp in Wichita, Kansas, collided with an Army helicopter and crashed into the Potomac River.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Why Sharks GM Mike Grier might be on edge during 4 Nations Face-Off
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks center Mikael Granlund was named an assistant captain for Finland's 4 Nations Face-Off team
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: McDonald's announces Angel Reese Special, set to debut in February
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Angel Reese is set to add another first to her list of celebrity endorsements and accomplishments. In a post on X, fast food mega-chain McDonald's announced "The Angel Reese Special," will debut on Feb. 10 in collaboration with the Chicago Sky's star power forward.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Nashville bids for WNBA franchise with Candace Parker and Peyton Manning among investors
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — The chairman of the NHL's Nashville Predators and his wife want to bring the WNBA to Music City and have teamed up with a star-filled investor group including Candace Parker, Pro Football Hall of Fame quarterback Peyton Manning and entertainers Tim McGraw and Faith Hill.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: World champion Russian skaters on American Airlines jet built a new life as coaches in the US
item.description: TALLINN, Estonia (AP) — The two Russian figure skating coaches killed in the American Airlines crash were two-time Olympians and former world champions in the pairs event. They were also a married couple with a son who finished fourth last week at the U.S. national championships in Wichita, Kansas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Skating broadcasters Tara Lipinski, Johnny Weir emotional discussing 'unimaginable' loss from plane crash
item.description: Figure skating broadcasters Tara Lipinski and Johnny Weir were emotional in discussing the plane crash that is presumed to have taken the lives of many skaters.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Super Bowl 2025: Time, channel, halftime show, how to watch Chiefs vs. Eagles livestream
item.description: Kansas City's quest to become the first team to win three consecutive Super Bowls is a go. The Philadelphia Eagles are the last team standing that could stop them. Quarterback Patrick Mahomes and the Chiefs are back in the NFL title game — which will be on Feb.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Caitlin Clark and Fever will play exhibition against Brazilian National Team at Iowa
item.description: Caitlin Clark and the Indiana Fever will be playing the Brazilian National Team this WNBA preseason at the University of Iowa.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Unusual betting patterns surrounding play of Terry Rozier in 2023 game with Charlotte investigated
item.description: Unusual betting patterns surrounding the play of then-Charlotte Hornets guard Terry Rozier in a game nearly two years ago are now under investigation by federal prosecutors, part of the same probe that led to the lifetime ban of Toronto Raptors player Jontay Porter, the NBA confirmed Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Warriors celebrate big win over Thunder by drenching Steve Kerr
item.description: The Warriors defeated the Thunder for the second time this season. Afterward, they showered Kerr with ice water.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Oakland prepares to celebrate ‘most beloved teammate’ Rickey Henderson
item.description: Rickey Henderson's life will be celebrated Saturday at Oakland's Oracle Arena, next door to where he forged one of the greatest careers in baseball history.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: American figure skater sets record straight on viral rumor amid airline tragedy
item.description: American figure skater Jon Maravilla set the record straight about the viral rumor he was set to be on the doomed American Airlines flight.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Teens from a Boston skating club, their mothers, and coaches among passengers killed in air crash
item.description: Passengers aboard the American Airlines flight that collided with an Army helicopter and crashed into the Potomac River included athletes returning from the U.S. Figure Skating Championships and their Russian coaches.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Strength-sapping defense fuels No. 6 Houston's 13-game winning streak
item.description: MORGANTOWN, W.Va. (AP) — West Virginia’s Javon Small gestured and yelled for a teammate — any teammate — to get open closer to the basket. When that didn’t work, the Big 12's leading scorer forced up a 3-pointer just before the shot clock expired. Clank. Small was the latest star stifled by No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN RABY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Crosby's overtime goal beats Utah HC, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Sidney Crosby scored with 1:06 left in overtime as the Pittsburgh Penguins beat the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Wednesday. It was Crosby's 95th career game-winning goal, moving him past Steve Yzerman for the 13th most in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Pat Mahomes Sr. claims he was victimized by social media hack after perceived Bills insult
item.description: The father of Chiefs star quarterback Patrick Mahomes argued he is not responsible for the perceived diss directed at the Bills after Kansas City's AFC championship game victory.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU outlasts Baylor in overtime, 93-89
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It was a perfect night for one BYU freshman, and a perfect ending for BYU Tuesday night against Baylor.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Alyssa Thomas heading to Mercury from Sun in trade, AP source says
item.description: The Phoenix Mercury were finalizing a deal to acquire Alyssa Thomas from the Connecticut Sun, a person familiar with the trade told The Associated Press on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Florida coach Todd Golden cleared in Title IX investigation regarding stalking allegations
item.description: The University of Florida has cleared men's basketball coach Todd Golden following a four-month Title IX investigation into allegations of sexual exploitation, sexual harassment and stalking.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The Chiefs get more Mahomes magic and advance to 3rd straight Super Bowl, beating the Bills 32-29
item.description: Patrick Mahomes threw for 245 yards and a touchdown, ran through the Buffalo defense for two more scores, and relied on his defense at key moments to help the Kansas City Chiefs beat the Bills 32-29 on Sunday night and reach the Super Bowl for the third consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Bears hiring Declan Doyle as offensive coordinator
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — On the same evening the Chicago Bears are reportedly hiring their next defensive coordinator, the Bears have also committed to a new offensive coordinator under first-year head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Bears are hiring Dennis Allen as new DC
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears are hiring former New Orleans Saints head coach Dennis Allen as their new defensive coordinator, according to the NFL Network's Ian Rapoport.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bills cornerback Christian Benford ruled out of AFC title game vs. Chiefs with a concussion
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Buffalo Bills cornerback Christian Benford was ruled out of the AFC title game against the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday night with a concussion.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 25-year-old San Diego native pursuing pro golf dreams at Farmers Invitational
item.description: The Farmer's Insurance Invitational, presented by the Advocates Professional Golf Association (APGA) Tour, is taking place on the North Course at Torrey Pines, showcasing the next generation of professional golfers and supporting minority players who dream of joining the PGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: Runnin' Utes get swept by Baylor, 76-61
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a tough week offensively for the Utah basketball team. After scoring just 35 points against Houston, the Utes put up 61 in a 76-61 loss to Baylor Saturday at the Huntsman Center. Norchad Omier had 22 points and 12 rebounds, and V.J.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kneepkens scores 32 as Utes hold off BYU, 81-76
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The last time Gianna Kneepkens played against BYU, she suffered a season-ending knee injury in December of 2023. This time around, Kneepkens had one of the best days of her career.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Student stampede injures several ahead of AU vs. Tennessee basketball game
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (WRBL) – A chaotic scene unfolded Saturday morning outside Neville Arena as Auburn University students rushed to secure spots for the highly anticipated basketball game between #1 Auburn and #6 Tennessee.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth White, NewsNation

item.title: Boys Basketball: Kearny 67, Morse 53
item.description: The Komets were able to take down the Tigers tonight on Morse's homecourt, 67-53, as Kearny was led by Guards Caleb Fluhr and Julian Valladerez.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago faces Philadelphia on 4-game home slide
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (16-27, 11th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (19-26, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Bulls -3.5; over/under is 230.5 BOTTOM LINE: Chicago hosts Philadelphia looking to stop its four-game home slide.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Winnipeg hat trick sinks Utah HC, 5-2
item.description: WINNIPEG (AP) - Three goals ended Utah's three-game winning streak. Cole Perfetti scored his first NHL hat trick, including the go-ahead goal, for the Winnipeg Jets in a 5-2 win against the Utah Hockey Club at Canada Life Centre on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Fruita Wildcats dominate both ends of the court in rivalry showdown
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The Fruita Monument High School Wildcats girls’ basketball team continued their dominant form Tuesday night, following a blowout win over Central with a convincing victory over the Palisade Bulldogs.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Kucherov scores in OT to give Lightning 4-3 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Nikita Kucherov scored 58 seconds into overtime and had two assists as the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-3 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers bring back Robert Saleh as defensive coordinator
item.description: (KRON) -- The San Francisco 49ers will fill their vacant defensive coordinator position with a familiar face. Robert Saleh will return to lead the team's defense after a tenure as the New York Jets' head coach, the 49ers announced Friday. Saleh was the 49ers' defensive coordinator from 2017-2020.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: L.A.'s Genesis Invitational will be held at Torrey Pines due to fires
item.description: After several major fires erupted in Los Angeles earlier this month, the 2025 Genesis Invitational scheduled for next month has been moved to Torrey Pines Golf Course, the PGA Tour confirmed in a social media post Friday morning.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Legendary former USC football coach will reportedly return to the NFL
item.description: A former National Championship-winning coach for the University of Southern California is taking his talents back to the NFL.
item.dc:creator: KTLA 5

item.title: Montrose girls & boys basketball is rolling and ready to take that next step
item.description: With defense, work ethic and belief in themselves, Montrose boys and girls basketball believe the sky is the limit.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: LeBron James picked for 21st straight All-Star Game, extending NBA record
item.description: LeBron James is extending his All-Star records. And Giannis Antetokounmpo is the people’s choice, again. The NBA revealed the starters — some of them, anyway — for the revamped All-Star Game on Thursday night, and there wasn't much in the way of surprises.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, NewsNation
